title: Michael / Sergey
summary: Michael and Sergey discussed Zoho CRM database issues and account limits. They decided to develop a minimal branding skill for organizational deployment via the Anthropic account. Sergey will create a GitHub repository for skills, and Michael will contact Harinder to address account limits.

decisions.description: Develop a minimal branding skill defining basic guidelines like names and colors for organizational deployment via the Anthropic account.
Create a new GitHub repository for organization skills with basic structure and placeholder files.
Michael will spin up a new project for all Straw work and migrate related settings and skills.
Michael will contact Harinder to investigate obtaining more resources for the limited account.

actionItems.task: Create new GitHub repository for organization skills. Include basic structure and placeholder files.

expectedOutcome.description: A new repository exists with a defined structure for organization skills.

actionItems.task: Spin up new project for all Straw work. Migrate related settings and skills.

expectedOutcome.description: New project created with Straw work migrated.

actionItems.task: Contact Harinder regarding current account limitations. Investigate obtaining more resources for the limited account.

expectedOutcome.description: Increased account resources or clarification on current limits.

tensions: Concerns raised about the Zoho CRM database model, specifically that 4 critical tables (users, tasks, meetings, calls) appeared disconnected.
Usage limits were exceeded, causing extra expense.
